# Saffire EV

> Saffire EV, by Koyo Gears India Private Limited, builds electric three-wheelers (L5 category) for the Indian market, focused on affordable and reliable commercial and passenger EV mobility.

## Company
- Brand: Saffire EV
- Parent company: Koyo Gears India Private Limited
- Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India
- Category: Electric three-wheelers (L5 vehicles) — cargo and passenger

## Products

### Saffire Swiss Cargo
- Type: Electric cargo three-wheeler (L5)
- Use case: Last-mile logistics, business delivery, commercial load movement
- Payload capacity: 600 kg
- Range per charge: 200 km
- Charging time: 5–6 hours (standard charger)
- Battery: 14.61 kWh (63V 232Ah)
- Motor peak power: 6.3 kW
- Top speed: 50 km/hr

### Saffire Smart Ride
- Type: Electric passenger three-wheeler (L5, D+3 configuration)
- Use case: Daily passenger mobility, urban routes, driver-operated transport
- Passenger capacity: Driver + 3 passengers (D+3 layout)
- Range per charge: 200 km
- Charging time: 5–6 hours (standard charger)
- Battery: 14.61 kWh (63V 232Ah)
- Motor peak power: 6.3 kW
- Top speed: 50 km/hr

## Key Facts
- Saffire EV positions itself as India's most affordable and reliable EV ecosystem for L5 vehicles.
- Dealer and fleet partnerships are open — see /ev-dealership-india/
- Cost comparison vs diesel/petrol autos is available via the on-site profitability calculator at saffireev.com
